source_text: Late Submission Penalties for Late Submission of Cost Report will be imposed as given in section DR Document Requirements. ### 5.3.7 Cost Addendum 5.3.7.1 A supplement to the Cost Report that reflects any changes or corrections made after the submission of the Cost Report may be submitted
